theme: microgrid frequency regulation via reserve dispatch
title: Reserve Dispatch Against a Dead-Time Actuator
innovation_hook: Command reserves against the predicted post-lag state, damping the deterministic delay instead of the visible error.
strategies: trivial: constant feedforward reserve equal to the forecast's mean -- no feedback, no model use at all

greedy: deadbeat proportional controller that cancels the currently visible deviation using the true a/b/d model but without accounting for the actuator's L-step dead-time -- overshoots into sustained oscillation across the instability threshold whenever the lag is not small relative to the grid's memory or the disturbance is abrupt

strong: dead-time (Smith-predictor-style) compensator -- propagates the known model L steps ahead using the public forecast and the already-committed in-flight commands, and damps that PREDICTED post-lag state instead of the visible error
invalid: ignores the u_max box constraint -- scores 0 on every instance
